testcase.classname: Gemini Provider Streaming should support streaming in Gemini
testcase.name: Gemini Provider Streaming should support streaming in Gemini
testcase.failure:
Error: BamlError: BamlClientError: Something went wrong with the LLM client: Failed to parse into a response accepted by baml_runtime::internal::llm_client::primitive::google::types::GoogleResponse: {"candidates":[{"content":{"role":"model"},"finishReason":"STOP","index":0}],"usageMetadata":{"promptTokenCount":21,"candidatesTokenCount":15,"totalTokenCount":36,"promptTokensDetails":[{"modality":"TEXT","tokenCount":21}]},"modelVersion":"gemini-1.5-pro-001"}
Caused by: missing field `parts` at BamlStream.getFinalResponse (/Users/aaronvillalpando/Projects/baml/engine/language_client_typescript/stream.js:60:39) at Object.<anonymous> (/Users/aaronvillalpando/Projects/baml/integ-tests/typescript/tests/providers/gemini.test.ts:11:21)
